idea-plugin.name: Suno MCP
idea-plugin.description:
AI Music Generation with Suno via Model Context Protocol (MCP).

This plugin helps you set up the MCP Suno server with JetBrains AI Assistant. Once configured, AI Assistant can generate songs, lyrics, covers, remixes, and more using Suno AI — all powered by Ace Data Cloud.

Features

  • 27 AI Music Tools — Generate, extend, cover, remix, mashup, stems, and more
  • Easy Setup — One-click copy MCP configuration for AI Assistant
  • Dual Mode — STDIO (local) and HTTP (remote) server support
  • Token Management — Store API token securely in IDE settings

Available Tools

  • Generate — Create songs from text prompts or custom lyrics
  • Extend — Continue a song from a specific timestamp
  • Cover — Create covers and remixes in different styles
  • Mashup — Blend multiple songs together
  • Stems — Separate vocals and instruments
  • Lyrics — Generate and optimize lyrics
  • Persona — Save and reuse voice styles
  • Export — Get MP4, WAV, MIDI, and timing data

Quick Start

  1. Install this plugin
  2. Open Settings → Tools → Suno MCP
  3. Enter your Ace Data Cloud API token
  4. Click Copy Config and paste into Settings → Tools → AI Assistant → MCP

Requires uv (Python package runner) for STDIO mode, or use HTTP mode for zero-install remote access.

action.description: Copy STDIO MCP configuration for AI Assistant
Copy HTTP MCP configuration for AI Assistant

idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.0

  • Initial release
  • MCP server integration with JetBrains AI Assistant
  • STDIO and HTTP transport modes
  • Settings UI for API token management
  • One-click MCP config copy
